agent: 'agent'
description: 'Make the battle screen visually readable'

Implement a proper battle presentation layer.

Read first:
- docs/combat_rules.md
- docs/milestone_4_visual_pass.md

Task:
- Render allies and enemies in separate screen areas
- Highlight the active unit
- Render HP, MP, and Life clearly
- Show turn order as a visible UI strip
- Show action menu visually
- Show target selection visually
- Keep current battle rules and inputs unless UI changes require small adjustments

Do not add major new battle mechanics.
Focus on readability and game feel.
